paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close, but a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. There has been one new news article in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include an article from simplywall.st discussing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news may be driving current market activity.

There have been recent SEC filings, including a Form 8-K filed on July 15, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there was a Form 8-K filed on July 13, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, and a Form 4 filing, although details of the Form 4 filing are not provided.
